data.name: Rừng Vàng
data.overview: Rừng Vàng xoay quanh hành trình bảo vệ danh dự và gia sản của Phương Ngưỡng Thiên, người đứng đầu đế chế thương mại Phương Thị có trị giá hàng tỷ. May mắn sống sót sau một tai nạn xe hơi, tỷ phú Phương Ngưỡng Thiên khiến cả gia đình bàng hoàng khi tuyên bố sẽ tái hôn với một cô gái trẻ hơn mình ba mươi tuổi và chuyển hết toàn bộ tài sản vào một quỹ tín thác do đối thủ của gia đình họ Phương quản lý. Khi ba người con trai xúi giục bà nội kiện ra tòa, Chủ tịch Phương thà kiện cáo với mẹ và trở mặt với con cái chứ không chịu khuất phục. Động cơ thật sự phía sau sự thay đổi đột ngột và bất thường này của Chủ tịch Phương là gì?

data.biography:
Michael Austin Cera (born June 7, 1988) is a Canadian actor and musician. He started his career as a child actor, voicing the character of Brother Bear on the children’s television show The Berenstain Bears and portraying a young Chuck Barris in Confessions of a Dangerous Mind (2002).

He has had numerous roles in United States television and film productions, including character George Michael Bluth on the sitcom Arrested Development (2003–2006, 2013, 2018–2019) and for his film roles as Evan in Superbad (2007), Paulie Bleeker in Juno (2007), Scott Pilgrim in Scott Pilgrim vs. the World (2010), and a fictional version of himself in This Is the End (2013). He voiced Dick Grayson/Robin in The Lego Batman Movie (2017), Barry (a deformed sausage) in Sausage Party (2016), and Sal Viscuso, the voice behind the announcements in Childrens Hospital.

Cera made his Broadway debut in the 2014 production of Kenneth Lonergan's This Is Our Youth. For his performance in the 2018 production of Lonergan's Lobby Hero, Cera was nominated for the Tony Award for Best Performance by a Featured Actor in a Play. Cera starred in the revival of Lonergan's The Waverly Gallery.

In addition to acting, Cera is a musician, having released his debut album True That in 2014. Cera has also performed as the touring bassist for indie rock supergroup Mister Heavenly.
data.name: Michael Cera

data.biography: Michael Austin Cera (né le 7 juin 1988) est un acteur canadien surtout connu pour ses rôles dans Arrested Development, Youth in Revolt, Superbad, Scott Pilgrim vs. the World et Juno. Cera a reçu le Canadian Comedy Award 2008 pour la meilleure performance masculine pour son travail dans Superbad. Depuis 2008, Cera a joué dans Year One, Youth in Revolt, Nick et Norah's Infinite Playlist, Paper Heart et Scott Pilgrim vs. The World.

Michael Austin Cera (* 7. Juni 1988 in Brampton, Ontario; auch Michael Céra) ist ein kanadischer Schauspieler und Musiker.

Er trat bisher in über dreißig Rollen in verschiedenen Fernsehserien und Filmen auf, unter anderem in dem Familienfilm Ein unschlagbares Doppel (1999) mit Mary-Kate Olsen und Ashley Olsen und in dem Science-Fiction-Film Frequency (2000) mit Dennis Quaid. In der dramatischen Agentenserie Nikita mit Peta Wilson und Roy Dupuis spielte Cera im Jahr 2000 in der Folge 4x10 Der Junge von Sektion vier (He Came from Four) die Gastrolle des Jerome. Weiterhin hatte er eine Nebenrolle in dem Film Geständnisse – Confessions of a Dangerous Mind (2002) von und mit George Clooney. Mit vierzehn Jahren drehte er die Pilotfilme für die Comedyserie Arrested Development und verkörperte darin von 2003 bis 2006 in 53 Folgen George-Michael Bluth. Im Mai 2013 kehrte die Serie beim Video-on-Demand-Anbieter Netflix für 15 neue Episoden zurück, in denen er seine Rolle wieder aufnimmt.

Im Jahr 2002 war Cera für das Fernsehdrama My Louisiana Sky für einen Young Artist Award nominiert. Bei den Screen Actors Guild Awards 2005 und 2006 und 2014 war er jeweils zusammen mit der restlichen Besetzung von Arrested Development in der Kategorie Bestes Schauspielensemble in einer Fernsehserie – Komödie nominiert. Bei der Internet-Comedyserie Clark and Michael (2006) wirkte er als Schauspieler, Regisseur, Drehbuch­autor, Produzent und Filmeditor mit.

2007 gelang Cera der Durchbruch mit seinen Rollen in den Filmkomödien Superbad und Juno.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Michael Austin Cera é um ator e músico canadense, conhecido por sua interpretação como George Michael Bluth na série Arrested Development, e por seus papéis principais nos filmes de comédia: Superbad, Juno, Nick and Norah's Infinite Playlist, Youth in Revolt e Scott Pilgrim vs. the World.

💥Майкл Остин Сера. Родился в 1988-ом году в Онтарио, Канада. Был 2-ым из 3-их детей. Отец работал техником звукозаписи, а мать была администратором. Учился в школе Харт-Лейк. Работает актёром, музыкантом, продюсером и сценаристом. Женат на немке Надин, у пары 2 сына, имена не раскрывают

🏆Главные награды🏆: Satellite Awards (2008) [Суперперцы], Canadian Comedy Awards (2010) [Скотт Пилигрим против всех]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Скотт Пилигрим против всех» (2010), «Суперперцы» (2007), «Джуно» (2007), «Начало времён» (2009), «Барби» (2023)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Майкл не ведёт соцсетей и известен своей застенчивостью
data.name: Майкл Сера

data.biography:
Michael Austin Cera (7 Haziran 1988 doğumlu), Kanadalı bir aktör ve müzisyen. Kariyerine çocuk oyuncu olarak başladı, Berenstain Bears çocuk televizyon programında Brother Bear karakterini seslendirerek ve Confessions of a Dangerous Mind (2002) filminde genç Chuck Barris'i canlandırarak.

Arrested Development sitcomunda George Michael Bluth karakteri ve Superbad'de (2007) Evan, Juno'da (2007) Paulie Bleeker, Scott Pilgrim vs. the World'de (2010) Scott Pilgrim ve This Is the End'de (2013) kendisinin kurgusal bir versiyonu olarak film rolleri gibi birçok rolü oldu. The Lego Batman Movie'de (2017) Dick Grayson/Robin'i seslendirdi, Sausage Party'de (2016) Barry (şekil değiştiren bir sosis) karakterini canlandırdı ve Childrens Hospital'daki duyuruların sesi olan Sal Viscuso'yu seslendirdi.

Cera, Kenneth Lonergan'ın This Is Our Youth (2014) prodüksiyonunda Broadway'de sahne aldı. 2018'deki Lonergan'ın Lobby Hero prodüksiyonundaki performansıyla Tony Ödülü'ne Aday Gösterildi. Cera, Lonergan'ın The Waverly Gallery'inin yeniden canlandırmasında da rol aldı.

Oyunculuk dışında Cera bir müzisyen olup, debut albümü True That'ı 2014'te yayınlamıştır. Ayrıca, indie rock süpergrubu Mister Heavenly için turne bas gitaristi olarak da performans sergilemiştir.

Makoto Koichi (小市 眞琴, Koichi Makoto, February 17) is a Japanese stage actress, voice actress, and choreographer from Tokyo. She is currently affiliated with tomorrow jam, and previously with Atomic Monkey (April 2014–April 1, 2021) and Stay Luck (April 1, 2021–December 1, 2024). She is sometimes miscredited as 小市 真琴.
data.name: Makoto Koichi

data.biography: Makoto Koichi (小市 眞琴, Koichi Makoto, 17 de febrero) es una actriz de teatro, actriz de voz y coreógrafa japonesa de Tokio. Actualmente está afiliada a tomorrow jam y anteriormente lo estuvo a Atomic Monkey (de abril de 2014 al 1 de abril de 2021) y Stay Luck (del 1 de abril de 2021 al 1 de diciembre de 2024). A veces se le acredita erróneamente como 小市 真琴.
data.name: Makoto Koichi

data.biography: 小市真琴是日本的女性聲優、舞台劇女演員。出身於東京都，所屬公司為 tomorrow jam。
data.name: 小市真琴

data.biography:
小市真琴（日语：小市 眞琴／こいち まこと Koichi Makoto，2月17日—）是日本的女性声优、舞台演员、编舞家，东京都出身。隶属于Stay Luck。

高中时就读演剧科，并开始以演戏为目标。成为声优前主要是在A-Light（A-Theater）旗下从事舞台演员的工作。2010年11月开始使用目前的艺名。演出舞台剧《幸运☆星≒音乐☆舞台》时，曾观赏动画版的《幸运☆星》作为研究，并因此对声优界产生兴趣。

喜欢小孩子，曾想要成为保姆，但由于不擅长读书而放弃。
data.name: 小市真琴

data.biography:
Alice Maud Krige is a South African actress and producer. Her first feature film role was as the Gilbert and Sullivan singer Sybil Gordon in the 1981 Academy Award-winning film Chariots of Fire. Since then, she has played a variety of roles in a number of genres. Krige first played the role of the Borg Queen in the motion picture Star Trek: First Contact and reprised the role for the final episode of the television series Star Trek: Voyager. A year after the series ended, she reprised the role in "Borg Invasion 4-D" at Star Trek: The Experience.

She attended Rhodes University in Grahamstown where she pursued an undergraduate degree in psychology and literature, but quickly turned to acting, earning an honors degree in drama from Rhodes, before a moving to London to pursue a new career path. Once in England, she studied drama at the London Central School of Speech and Drama before making her acting performance debut in the 1979 BBC Play for Today.  

After achieving critical acclaim for her role in Chariot's of Fire, and continued to star and support in both film and stage theater throughout the 1980s.  This eclectic trend continued into the 1990s before turning to television for both starring and reoccurring minor roles in prominent television series.  In addition, she continued to make sporadic convention appearances and was recently awarded an honorary doctorate in literature from Rhodes University.  Alice Krige is married to writer/director, Paul Schoolman, and lives what she describes as an "itinerant" lifestyle. Although she and her husband maintain a permanent home in the United States, they spend much of their time living and working abroad.
data.name: Alice Krige

data.biography: Alice Krige urodziła się i wychowała w Afryce Południowej, studiowała psychologię na uniwersytecie w Rodezji, później przeniosła się do The Central School of Speech and Drama, gdzie studiowała aktorstwo. Zagrała m.in. w filmach: "Opowieść o dwóch miastach" (TV), "Chariots of Fire" , "Ghost Story", "Haunted Summer", "See You in the Morning". W telewizji wystąpiła m.in. w serialu "Beverly Hills 90210"(1992) jako Anne Berrisford. Wzięła udział w produkcjach biblijnych; "Król Dawid" /King David/ (1985) australijskiego reżysera Bruce'a Beresforda w roli Batszeby, żony Dawida i matki Salomona, oraz jako Rachel w telefilmie "Józef"(1995) Rogera Younga. Jest laureatką nagrody na festiwalu filmowym w Rzymie w 1992 roku za postać Mary Brady, w horrorze na podstawie książki Stephena Kinga "Lunatycy"(1992). Natomiast za rolę królowej Borg w filmie "Star Trek: First Contact"(1996, video: "Star Trek: Pierwszy kontakt") Jonathana Frakesa odebrała nagrodę Saturna.

Fille d'un couple de médecins, Alice Krige passe son enfance à Port Elizabeth. Elle part pour l'Angleterre en 1976 afin d'y étudier la psychologie clinique, mais après des débuts dans une troupe de théâtre universitaire décide de s'inscrire à la Central School of Speech and Drama de Londres.

Elle apparaît la première fois à la télévision Britannique en 1979, dans une adaptation d'Un Conte de deux villes de Charles Dickens. Elle accède à une reconnaissance internationale en 1981 avec le rôle de Sybil Gordon dans Les Chariots de feu et celui d'Eva Galli/Alma Mobley dans Le Fantôme de Milburn.

Cette même année 1981, elle est couronnée aux Laurence Olivier Awards en tant que meilleure révélation dans un premier rôle, pour sa performance dans une pièce de George Bernard Shaw, Le Héros et le Soldat. Cette récompense entraîne son admission à la Royal Shakespeare Company.

Alice Krige interprète Bethsabée dans Le Roi David (1985) et Mary Shelley dans Un été en enfer (1988). Au théâtre, elle interprète la Venise sauvée de Thomas Otway.

Son interprétation de la reine des Borg, qui veut rallier la Terre au Collectif dans Star Trek : Premier Contact (1996), lui vaut le prix Saturn du meilleur second rôle en 1997. C'est le début d'une série de participations dans des films de science-fiction, notamment dans l'univers de la série Star Trek : Star Trek: Armada II (2001), Star Trek: Voyager (2001), ou encore dans le feuilleton TV Les Enfants de Dune (2003).

L'université Rhodes lui attribue un doctorat honoris causa ès lettres en avril 2004.

Source : https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alice_Krige

data.biography: Елизавета Ильинична Кононова родилась в Москве 19 марта 1997 года. В три года мама отдала ее в детский сад с театральным уклоном, с тех пор девушка постоянно в профессии. Также стрех лет Лиза танцует классические и народные танцы.
data.name: Елизавета Кононова

data.biography: Chen Linong (traditional Chinese: 陳立農; simplified Chinese: 陈立农) is a Taiwanese singer and actor active in mainland China. He took part in the Chinese survival show Idol Producer and debuted as a member of Chinese boy group NINE PERCENT (百分九) as a vocalist. He released his first solo album Unbelonging (格格不入) on May 29, 2020.
data.name: Chen Linong

data.name: Vương Giả Thiên Hạ
data.overview: Vào thời Chiến Quốc của Trung Hoa cổ đại, chiến tranh đã gây nên vô số những điều thảm khốc khiến cho nhiều người mất đi gia đình, người thân. Tín là một trong số đó, cậu có ước mơ trở thành đại tướng quân thống lĩnh binh lính xung trận. Để rồi cuộc đời đưa đẩy Tín trở thành người phò tá dưới trướng đương kim thánh thượng Doanh Chính - người có gương mặt giống hệt bạn thân Phiêu của Tín.

data.biography: Esma Daniel Md Isa (born 16 January 1969) is a Malaysian actress and director. He started his entertainment career in 1991 after winning the Hero Remaja competition 1990/1991.
data.name: Esma Daniel

data.biography:
Ravi Narayan (doğum adıyla Rohinal Ravinesh Narayan), Auckland, Yeni Zelanda'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Oyuncu, dansçı ve dublör olan Narayan, özellikle fiziksel özellikleri ve yetenekleri sayesinde fantastik ve bilimkurgu sinemasında kendine özgü bir kariyer inşa etmiştir. Sektördeki ilk büyük çıkışını, Peter Jackson'ın yönettiği efsanevi "Hobbit" (The Hobbit) üçlemesinde (2012-2014) yaparak dikkatleri üzerine çekti. Bu seride, ana karakterlerden cüce Kíli ve Fíli'nin "ölçek dublörü" (scale double) olarak görev aldı ve filmdeki perspektif hilelerinin yaratılmasında kritik bir rol oynadı. Ayrıca "Hobbit: Beklenmedik Yolculuk" (An Unexpected Journey) filminde Bilbo Baggins'e saldıran Goblin karakterini canlandırdı.

Kariyerine "Yogi Ayı" (Yogi Bear) (2010) gibi yapımlarda dublörlük yaparak başlayan Narayan, televizyon dünyasında da aktif rol aldı. "Power Rangers Dino Charge" dizisinde bir Elf'i canlandırdı ve Netflix yapımı "Sweet Tooth" (2021) ile aile filmi "Kiwi Christmas" (2017) gibi yapımlarda boy gösterdi.

Ravi Narayan'ın kariyerindeki en güncel ve dikkat çekici proje ise, 2025 yapımı bilimkurgu-aksiyon filmi "Predator: Badlands" oldu. Elle Fanning ve Dimitrius Schuster-Koloamatangi'nin başrollerini paylaştığı bu büyük bütçeli filmde, "Bud" karakterine hayat verdi. Bu rol, onun uluslararası arenadaki tanınırlığını artıran ve yeteneğini daha geniş kitlelere sergilemesini sağlayan önemli bir adım oldu. Narayan, oyunculuğunun yanı sıra dublörlük yetenekleri ve dans geçmişiyle de tanınmaktadır.
